tissue: Non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) ranks as one of the leading causes of cancer-related deaths worldwide.
disease_state: Josephin domain containing 2 (JOSD2) promotes lung cancer by inhibiting LKB1 (Liver kinase B1) activity
sample_source: To further investigate the contribution of JOSD2 in NSCLC growth in preclinical settings, we used patient-derived cell (PDC) and patient-derived xenograft (PDX) models...
anatomic_site_tumor: To validate the influence of JOSD2 on tumor formation in vivo, nude mice were subcutaneously transplanted with NCI-H358 cells...
cell_line: we knocked down these DUBs one by one in 3 NSCLC cell lines including NCI-H1299, NCI-H358 and PC-9...
